findings.title: Merger-Related Costs
findings.summary: The ITC Operating Companies recorded merger-related costs in operating accounts included in the determination of transmission formula rate billings, rather than in Account 426.5, Other Deductions, as required by Commission precedent. The improper accounting led to inappropriate recovery of the merger-related costs in transmission formula rate billings.
